summary: Root cause found and fixed: JSON deserialize failed because top-level keys (Windows, macOS, Linux) were not mapped to C# property 'OS'. System.Text.Json only maps exact property names by default. Fix: added FingerprintTemplate.FromJson() using JsonNode to dynamically read the JSON structure — iterates top-level keys, skips arrays (Timezones, Languages), deserializes OS blocks as OsTemplate. Added OsTemplate.FromJson() to FingerprintConfig.cs. Build 0 errors.
current_status: Model dropdown now populated: template deserializes 5 OS keys (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS) with 11 Windows models. CreateProfile modal cascade fully working.
